case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. JOHNREY I MAGCALING ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT (C.C.P. SECTION 664.6) POINTS AND AUTHORITIES; AND DELCARATION (TRANSACTION ID # 76004497) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. HEARING SET FOR MAY-05-2025 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 301
DECLARATION OF FLINT C. ZIDE RE: DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS ON STIPULATED AGREEMENT AND REQUEST TO ENTER JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76004497) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR MAR-23-2027 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N.A.'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS DIRECTED TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED JUDGMENT FOR $10,188.11 AGAINST DEFENDANT JOHNREY MAGCALING; THIS IS THE SETTLEMENT AMOUNT ($12,047.11) LESS WHAT DEFENDANT HAS PAID ($1,859.00). PLAINTIFF MAY SEEK ADDITIONAL COSTS THROUGH A COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER AND A PROPOSED JUDGMENT WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement (C.C.P. Section 664.6) Points And Authorities; And Delcaration
Off Calendar May-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S Motion To Enforce Settlement (C.C.P. Section 664.6)

Plaintiff Bank of America N.A.'s unopposed motion to enforce settlement is granted. Plaintiff is directed to submit a proposed judgment for $10,188.11 against defendant Johnrey Magcaling; this is the settlement amount ($12,047.11) less what defendant has paid ($1,859.00). Plaintiff may seek additional costs through a cost bill after judgment.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
